Bash(python3 -c "
import ssl
import urllib.request
import json

ctx = ssl.create_default_context\(\)
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE

doi = '10.3390/su172411278'
url = f'https://api.crossref.org/works/{doi}'
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=10, context=ctx\) as r:
    data = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
    msg = data['message']
    print\('Title:', msg.get\('title', ['N/A']\)[0]\)
    print\('Authors:', [a.get\('family',''\) + ' ' + a.get\('given',''\) for a in msg.get\('author',[]\)]\)
    print\('Journal:', msg.get\('container-title', ['N/A']\)[0]\)
    print\('Year:', msg.get\('published',{}\).get\('date-parts',[['']]\)[0][0]\)
    abstract = msg.get\('abstract','N/A'\)
    print\('Abstract:', abstract[:1000]\)
")
